body:
Bill, thanks for the note — always good to hear your take on the market, especially given how choppy things have felt since the new year. I wanted to follow up on the [Halfway Capital](org/halfway-capital) portfolio review we discussed last week, specifically around a few of the climate infrastructure positions we're watching closely heading into Q2. I've been going back and forth on whether to accelerate the Series A conversation with one of our grid-edge analytics companies, and your instinct on timing would be genuinely useful here. Would you have 30 minutes sometime next week to get on a call? I know you're heads-down on your own deal flow right now, but I think this one might actually sit at an intersection you'd find interesting.

Amara
